nasb.text: Shall I not punish them for these things?” declares the Lord. “On a nation such as this Shall I not avenge Myself?

esv.text: Shall I not punish them for these things? declares the Lord, and shall I not avenge myself on a nation such as this?

cnv.text: 我因這些事怎能不懲罰他們呢？ 像這樣的國家， 我怎能不親自報復呢？” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 难道我不该惩罚他们吗？ 难道我不该报应这样的民族吗？ 这是耶和华说的。”
